name: nlopt_child_process
short_description: Entry for nlopt child process control
full_help:
nlopt_child_process

Description: 
Entry for nlopt child process control

Syntax: 
nlopt_child_process  -mainShmName <arg> -shmShift <arg> -workerId <arg>
                     -intFolderPath <arg> -eNumber <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  -mainShmName    Main shared memory name
  -shmShift       Shared memory address shift due to alignment and array 
                  overhead
  -workerId       Worker ID
  -intFolderPath  Relative folder path for intermediate files
  -eNumber        E number
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Shared memory address shift due to alignment and array overhead
Relative folder path for intermediate files
